title: Fix operator == for unpacked struct, if elements are VlUnpacked arrays

features.name: unpacked struct with nested struct containing multidimensional unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct that has a nested struct member containing a multidimensional unpacked array (e.g., logic [7:0] arr[2][3])

features.name: struct comparison with VlUnpacked array member
features.description: Code should include comparison operators (== or !=) applied to unpacked structs that have VlUnpacked array members

features.name: unpacked struct with typedef'd array member type
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct containing an array member whose type is defined via a typedef of another unpacked struct
